text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking around<n>the academy,
I hear a familiar voice.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
T-Tachyon, you shouldn't rely solely<n>on snacks.
Please, you need to eat a<n>proper meal...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I do not. In most<n>circumstances, snacks
are, in fact, the<n>most efficient and convenient
method<n>of receiving nutrients.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah, perfect timing. You agree with me,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: W-wait! I made lunch for you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower holds out a lunch box<n>and takes
off the lid to reveal a variety<n>of colorful foods
packed inside it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm. Well, then...
choice_data_list: The side dishes are so cute.
The side dishes are so cute.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm. Well, then...
choice_data_list: The side dishes are so cute.
The side dishes are so cute.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Are those carrots cut into<n>hearts and
stars? You even made the<n>hot dog sausages
look like octopuses.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What wholly incomprehensible<n>shapes! But
they're utterly<n>fascinating!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Aw... I thought my hot dog octopuses<n>looked
tasty...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I see... So you were trying to see<n>how the
taste of food is altered<n>according to its visual
presentation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Consider my curiosity piqued. I shall<n>lend you my
assistance in this noble<n>research!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, if that means you'll eat it, then<n>that's all that
matters... ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This meal appears to have an excess<n>of beta
carotene. This is surely more<n>than the daily
required amount.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I boiled the carrots<n>whole since I
heard you lose fewer<n>nutrients that way.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I also stewed them in a sweet sauce<n>hoping it
would be to your liking,<n>ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That is a sensible cooking method<n>indeed. I have
no qualms about your<n>considerations for my
palate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it appears proper meals really<n>do possess
benefits that differ from<n>portable snacks. This
calls for further<n>research!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
U-um! It would be wonderful if you ate<n>more of
this... For "further research,"<n>that is!
